query:
INSERT INTO product_variants (productId, variantName, variantType, productionStatus, isDefault, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  id,
  CONCAT(sku, '-V001'),
  'universal',
  'production',
  1,
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM products
WHERE sku IN ('DT-001-OAK', 'DT-002-MRB', 'AC-001-CHR')
AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT productId FROM product_variants WHERE productId IS NOT NULL);
